headline: Google releases Gemini 3.6 Flash with expanded model portfolio
body: Google launched Gemini 3.6 Flash alongside 3.5 Flash-Lite and 3.5 Flash Cyber variants, marking a significant expansion of its model lineup with 100 unique authors covering the release across major platforms. For healthcare AI, this multi-tier approach enables different deployment scenarios: Flash for real-time clinical decision support, Flash-Lite for resource-constrained EHR integrations, and Flash Cyber for security-hardened applications in regulated environments. The velocity and breadth of coverage suggest healthcare vendors will face pressure to evaluate which Gemini variant fits their specific workflows, whether that's radiography analysis, documentation automation, or compliance-intensive care coordination. Expect rapid adoption signals in the next 30 days as healthcare organizations benchmark these models against existing Claude and GPT deployments for production use cases.
